title: Quoted grap focus and info lines
desc: Find output should quote the full grap expression so it can be pasted as one shell argument. Print one shared # FOCUS line per invocation using the common grap builder, print one # TARGET line per match, include the matched field/snippet in a brace block, and indent # INFO lines for compact markdown-like readability.
steps: Quote the full grap expression in # FOCUS and # TARGET so the output is paste-ready as one shell argument.
Use the shared grap builders for both focus and target output instead of hardcoded formatting.
Indent # INFO lines under each target and keep them short, high-signal, and markdown-friendly.
author: claude
